pages.text: $(bold)There is no elytra.$()$(br2)Aerial travel in this pack is $(thing)airships$() — built, fueled, and flown. $(item)Create: Aeronautics$() turns assembled contraptions into real flying vehicles you steer.$(br2)Slower than an elytra. Cooler in every other way.

$(bold)Building one.$()$(br2)Assemble a contraption with $(item)thrust bearings$() and $(item)propellers$(), bolt on a $(item)helm$() to steer, fuel it, and lift off. Add lights, anchors, cargo — whatever you'd put in a ship.$(br2)Ponder the parts. The mod is dense but generous with hints.

$(bold)What this opens up.$()$(br2)Crossing oceans without bridges. Reaching biomes that are otherwise a slog. Hauling cargo between bases that aren't on the rail network.$(br2)An airship is half vehicle, half base. People will live on theirs.
